description: Style NoteFresh from the brand's design studio, remanika pieces have been flying off myntra's shelves into fashionistas' wardrobes. This prettily styled versatile tunic is designed from luxe cotton (a summer luxury!) that you can style with leggings or colour block denims. For the summer, we suggest a beaded pair of thongs for your feet!Product DetailsPeachy pink tunic, has a bucket neck at the front and back, short sleeves, lace detail at the yoke, smocking at the back chest, flaring tucks below the bust and at the back and a mildly curved hemMaterial and Care CottonGentle machine wash Do not bleach and flat dry only Use cold iron Size and FitRegular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
